subcodes.first_line: O ye two brothers! Like twin stars in the horizon of the love of God, by His grace ye shine even as the twin stars of heaven [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای دو برادر چون دو کوکب دوپیکر در افق محبت الله بفضل خدا چون فرقدان تابانید
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @servitude; submission to God; repentance
